post.description:
Runs a rebalance for the specified symphonies given the specified starting state. This involves fetching both live and historical quotes, running all relevant symphonies, and returning which trades need to be executed (if any) to bring the symphony in line with its ideal state.

 "Dry runs" against test data can be performed by additionally supplying any subset of the quotes map, fractionability map, and rebalance date. All of these are individually optional, but you should most likely provide them all together, since e.g. if providing an end date in the past but not providing quotes, the rebalance will fetch today's quotes and use them as if they were from that date.
post.summary: Run a rebalance for the specified symphonies.

run_results.description: Map from symphony ID to run result

adjust_for_dtbp.description: Whether to recompute Buys for anticipated DTBP during the rebalance.

symphonies.description: Map from symphony ID to rebalance information
